name: Edits inside a stateful child component (counter)
notes: Edits inside StatefulCounter — a child component with its own state (count ref, computed label). The guidance treated 'stateful subtree' as uniformly fragile. Empirical observation refines this: the true boundary is REACTIVITY, not statefulness. Static template content inside the component (h3, button attrs/classes) survives without reinforcement. Reactive bindings ({{ label }}, which is a computed) are recovered because Vue re-renders them post-mount to match the computed's current value. Reinforcement re-applies the reactive op after mount — but the customer should know that reactive bindings are the actual fragile surface, not 'stateful' subtrees generally.
